infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PawProof uses the camera so you can scan vaccine records and take photos of your pets.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PawProof needs access to your photos so you can attach pictures of your pets, their documents, and journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PawProof saves exported pet health summaries to your photo library when you ask.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: PawProof sends reminders for feeding, walks, medications, and vaccine expirations.

plugins.photosPermission: PawProof needs access to your photos so you can attach pictures of your pets and their documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: PawProof uses the camera so you can scan vaccine records and take photos of your pets.
